backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a student experience sharing platform with CRUD for posts, category filtering, and stats (top upvoted/connected posts, category counts). Uses MixinStorage for blob storage and an in-memory Map for post persistence.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two features — fixing Dashboard page runtime errors and auditing the useGetStats hook — to their relevant files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing their purpose, recent changes, and key behaviors.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the full light and dark color theme, including sidebar, chart, and semantic UI tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to 'Memu Nerchunnavi' and mounting the app into a root div via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining five routes (/, /share, /post/:id, /dashboard, /about) wrapped in a LanguageProvider and a year-gate that blocks rendering until a college year is selected via YearSelectionModal.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component with a sticky header containing logo, pill navigation, language toggle, and a Bell/BellOff mute toggle that persists state via the sounds utility.
frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx: Post card component displaying category badge, content snippet, author year, and read-only upvote/connect counts, with a link to the post detail page and a formatTimeAgo utility.
frontend/src/components/ShareButtons.tsx: Renders share buttons for a post supporting WhatsApp sharing, clipboard copy, and the native Web Share API, with compact and full display modes.
frontend/src/components/YearSelectionMod: Full-screen modal that prompts the user to select their college year and optionally enter a college name, persisting the selection via useYearSelection.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: React context that manages English/Telugu language state (persisted in sessionStorage) and exposes a translation lookup function `t`.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching posts (all, by category, single), stats, and creating a post via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useYearSelection.ts: Utility hook that reads and writes the user's selected college year and college name to sessionStorage, dispatching a custom event on year change.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and defining Tailwind base styles, OKLCH CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and a dot-grid background pattern.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: Renders the About page for SeniorCompass, displaying a mission statement, a 4-step how-it-works grid, and a core values section with a banner image and navigation buttons.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Renders an analytics dashboard showing platform stats (total posts, upvotes, connections), top posts by upvotes and connects, a year distribution bar chart, and a category breakdown using data from query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Renders the main feed page with category filter tabs, a trending posts section, and a paginated list of post cards, fetching posts via React Query hooks and supporting i18n and sound effects.
frontend/src/pages/PostDetail.tsx: Renders the full detail view of a single post, including its content, category badge, timestamp, author year, upvote/connect actions, share buttons, and loading/error states.
frontend/src/pages/ShareExperience.tsx: Renders a form page for submitting a new post with category selection, a character-limited textarea, client-side validation, and a success confirmation screen with options to share another or browse the feed.
frontend/src/translations/index.ts: Defines English and Telugu translation strings for all UI text across the app, including navigation, forms, post cards, and page content. Exports a `Language` type and a `translations` object keyed by locale.
frontend/src/utils/sounds.ts: Provides Web Audio API-based sound utilities with mute persistence via sessionStorage. Exports `playBubblePop` (for upvotes/interactions) and `playTypingTick` (for textarea keystrokes).
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom fonts (Bricolage Grotesque, DM Sans), OKLCH-based color tokens, extended border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations. Includes typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the project's current state (version 15), summarizing the platform's purpose, architecture, existing features, and known issues. Serves as a planning/context document for the college feedback-sharing app.
